fix.item: Added the Joomla changelog URL to the package manifest so the Extensions: Manage version modal can be displayed.
Added external update and changelog metadata templates for the public update server.
Updated package, component and plugin versions to 1.0.62.
Added database update marker for version 1.0.62.
Improved 404 logging reliability for Joomla routing edge cases.
Fixed misleading dashboard status indicators for the Redirects / 404 section.
Replaced the technical 404 log table health-check label with clearer status information.
Separated the actual 404 logging status from database table availability checks.
Improved detection of modified article URLs that may resolve unexpectedly through Joomla routing.
Updated package, component and plugin versions to 1.0.61.
Added database update marker for version 1.0.61.

change.item: Refined the Redirects / 404 dashboard interface for clearer user feedback.

fix.item: Added the missing COM_JTSEO_CONFIGURATION language string.
Fixed the Joomla Options page title showing the raw language key.
Updated package, component and plugin versions to 1.0.57.
Added database update marker for version 1.0.57.

addition.item: Added pagination options to the Bulk Meta Manager.
Added a default Needs attention filter for low-score articles.
Added expandable advanced metadata fields in the Bulk Meta Manager.
Added privacy-friendly 404 logging options for query strings, referrers and user agents.
Added database update marker for version 1.0.56.

change.item: Improved the Bulk Meta Manager layout for a cleaner editing workflow.
Collapsed CSV Import / Export tools by default to reduce dashboard clutter.
Changed the Bulk Meta Manager save button text to better describe the action.
Improved responsive behavior for search, filter and reset controls.
Updated package, component and plugin versions to 1.0.56.
Updated README documentation for the public stable release.
Improved English and Turkish language strings.

fix.item: Optimized 404 logging to avoid unnecessary database writes on normal frontend page views.
Fixed Bulk Meta Manager button wrapping on narrow layouts.
Improved dashboard support link handling when optional URLs are empty.
Improved package integrity and update metadata consistency.
Added GPL license copies to package and child extension archives.
Cleaned the SQL update chain to avoid duplicate-column errors on mixed upgrade paths.
Added safe component installer schema alignment for redirect and 404 log tables.
Moved Structured Data dashboard mapping messages to language strings.
Removed deprecated asset fallback calls from the content plugin.
Updated README version and privacy note.
Clarified BreadcrumbList mapping copy for Joomla core Breadcrumbs module and duplicate JSON-LD checks.
Added optional Support / Community dashboard card with configurable project, GitHub and support links.
